mapper.sql: id, author_id, title, summary, content, cover_url, category, status, view_count, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, published_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
id, author_id, title, summary, cover_url, category, status, view_count, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, published_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version

a.id, a.author_id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_url, a.category, a.status, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.favorite_count, a.comment_count, a.published_at, a.created_at, a.updated_at, a.deleted_at, a.version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY published_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) AS article_count, COALESCE(SUM(view_count), 0) AS total_views, COALESCE(SUM(like_count), 0) AS total_likes, COALESCE(SUM(favorite_count), 0) AS total_favorites, COALESCE(SUM(comment_count), 0) AS total_comments, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'DRAFT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS draft_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'PUBLISHED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS published_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'OFFLINE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS offline_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'DELETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS deleted_count FROM blog_article WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
AND status = #{status}
SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY view_count DESC, like_count DESC, published_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE author_id IN
#{authorId}
AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY like_count DESC, published_at DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY published_at DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY view_count DESC, published_at DESC, id DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 100) + 1 FROM blog_article WHERE id < 10000000000
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO blog_article
id, author_id, title, summary, content, cover_url, category, status, view_count, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, published_at, created_at, updated_at,
#{id}, #{authorId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{coverUrl}, #{category}, #{status}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{commentCount}, #{publishedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_article SET title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, content = #{content}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, category = #{category}, status = #{status}, view_count = #{viewCount}, like_count = #{likeCount}, favorite_count = #{favoriteCount}, comment_count = #{commentCount}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_article ( id, author_id, title, summary, content, cover_url, category, status, view_count, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, published_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{authorId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{coverUrl}, #{category}, #{status}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{commentCount}, #{publishedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, content = #{content}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, category = #{category}, status = #{status}, view_count = #{viewCount}, like_count = #{likeCount}, favorite_count = #{favoriteCount}, comment_count = #{commentCount}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1
mapper.select: SELECT tag_name FROM blog_article_tag WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_article_tag SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_at IS NULL
AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND category = #{category}
AND id IN ( SELECT article_id FROM blog_article_tag WHERE tag_name = #{tag} AND deleted_at IS NULL )

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article a LEFT JOIN blog_user u ON a.author_id = u.id WHERE a.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.deleted_at IS NULL
AND ( a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND a.category = #{category}
AND a.id IN ( SELECT article_id FROM blog_article_tag WHERE tag_name = #{tag} AND deleted_at IS NULL )
AND ( u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{authorKeyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{authorKeyword}, '%') )
AND a.published_at >= #{dateFrom}
AND a.published_at < DATE_ADD(#{dateTo}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at >= #{date} AND created_at < DATE_ADD(#{date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at >= #{date}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT author_id) FROM blog_article WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT author_id, COUNT(*) as article_count, SUM(view_count) as total_views, SUM(like_count) as total_likes FROM blog_article WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY author_id ORDER BY total_views DESC, total_likes DESC LIMIT #{limit}
